findings.problem: Artifact-generation helper skills (propose, ff-change, continue-change) still contain superseded 'Codex local review' terminology in their guardrails, contradicting the new 'verifier-subagent-first' contract.
findings.evidence: .codex/skills/openspec-propose/SKILL.md:101, .codex/skills/openspec-ff-change/SKILL.md:92, and .codex/skills/openspec-continue-change/SKILL.md:116 still reference the coupled implementer self-review model.
findings.recommendation: Update generator skills to match the new workflow: 'verifier-subagent-first review, shared sequence verify-sequence/default, and tier-gated Gemini second opinion'.

skipped_checks: Runtime verification of platform-specific command resolution (Windows/Linux) beyond static document review.
